productDisplayName: Puma Men Benecio Mid Leather Brown Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Benecio Mid leather shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive high collar design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo embroidered behind collar Appliqued formstripes on the sides Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole for greater traction
